architectural_notes: Dashboard widget “Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)” appears to recalculate dues independently instead of reading the same monthly totals as “Listing Mensuel”, leading to inconsistent results.
known_issues: Bug: On “Tableau de bord”, the frame “Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)” shows an incorrect due sum for February (shows 4400) while February “Listing Mensuel” correctly shows 0 negative credit.

existing_features.title: Update the Dashboard calculation for the card "Dus (RDV Faits ; Mois Courant)" so it uses the exact same logic as the "Listing Mensuel" table total for "Crédit Négatif" (i.e., the monthlyListing.ts Excel-formula calculation), instead of reading backend field totalSoldeRestantNegatif.

Ensure the Dashboard has access to the required inputs for the shared negative-credit calculation (current month listings, previous month listings for credit carry-over, and all appointments), and use them consistently for the "Dus" card computation.

projectName: Fix Dashboard 'Due (Completed appointments; current month)' to match Monthly Listing negative credit total
